products.name: Curflow
products.tagline: Draw a gesture for your Mac to execute
products.description: Draw a gesture for your Mac to execute. A revolutionary way to control your Mac with custom gestures. Simply draw on your trackpad to trigger actions, launch apps, and automate workflows.

products.name: Kōan
products.tagline: See your AI agents think. Reasoning, tool calls & decisions
products.description: Kōan is an observability platform for AI agents. Visualize your agent's reasoning process, tool calls, and decision trees in real-time. Perfect for debugging and optimizing AI agent workflows.

products.name: Social Fetch
products.tagline: Pull real-time data from any social platform via API
products.description: Social Fetch provides a unified API to pull real-time data from any social platform. Get posts, comments, analytics, and trends from Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, and more with a single API call.

products.name: Devin for Terminal
products.tagline: A CLI agent that keeps working when you close your laptop
products.description: Devin for Terminal is a command-line AI agent that continues working in the background even when you close your laptop. Perfect for long-running tasks, code generation, and automated workflows.

products.name: SimCam
products.tagline: Test camera features directly in the iOS simulator
products.description: SimCam allows developers to test camera features directly in the iOS simulator. Simulate different lighting conditions, camera angles, and AR scenarios without needing physical devices.
